hero.title: Bruno Vilela de Moraes e Silva
hero.subtitle: Professor of Ecology at the Federal University of Bahia. My research explores how ecological, evolutionary, and environmental processes shape biological and cultural diversity across the globe. By combining biodiversity science, conservation, and data science, I seek to understand large-scale patterns of life and develop open tools that make ecological research more accessible and reproducible.
